textByHashes.f2d22832bebff1b0739833d86a90c98be6da6431: Yes, Evil Bob captured me and stuck me in this prison.
textByHashes.a9e17ee713369d8401b49f69be499febed9fc4f2: Some of these balloon animals have keys in them, and if you pull the big lever it tells you which shape animal contains the correct key, but I can never find it.
textByHashes.1903c58e927a1326d594a2ae331d05e34a6644eb: You need to pull the lever to find out which shape animal contains the key, then pop that sort of animal to get the key.
textByHashes.7892daf970737d6cead86c93a9c1e73e6a531378: Bring me any keys you get and I'll try them on the doors.
textByHashes.2ce3c3c960d41d8e7d1f0491045da386a4ad5adc: Oh. Well I guess you can leave but I'll still be stuck here.
textByHashes.0ff24aba2f77b4b88af16980bbce8d2b80828a61: Don't you remember? This is ScapeRune's prison. Evil Bob caught you and brought you here.
textByHashes.fc9c505c871871d0ba7e0918ded6c5226fa76fbe: Evil Bob doesn't care about people's rights. He's cruel and utterly merciless. He's a cat.
textByHashes.e242aa7bfcd83e726ea67e4314caa5480141f129: Come on, we should leave before Evil Bob comes back! You go first; I'll follow along.
textByHashes.18abf18847c4cc41ebf466d4430f02d92aadb087: Oi! we'll be using the exit that's over here.
textByHashes.10a4889dbf55dc829db2e45d0c078c14fa416e2e: You're meant to pull the lever to find out which sort of animal to pop!
textByHashes.efcb8fc8b7f07001583e0306a1b7e12d6902e8f4: That's right, pull it. Then remember what kind of animal shape you see. That's the animal that contains the right key.
textByHashes.8387e87e57e8941c64f02fe462efa9eb95a8e616: Great, now you've got a key! Bring it to me so I can try it on the doors.
textByHashes.c55ea95fbef60868e6b846cb41e925aeef0adc7b: Ooh, thanks! I'll see if it's the right one...
textByHashes.eca93b69e4d11da880636a816d3a79543200a387: Aww, that was the wrong key! You must have popped the wrong sort of animal. Try the big lever again - it'll tell you which animal to pop.
textByHashes.e7cd2108ba1ff9ad14c6545cef176f69d1893421: Hooray, you got the right one! Now pull the lever again and let's get the next portal unlocked!
textByHashes.dc82a8a8c9a7c65dc4adffefc8ff2b8643fb9da1: You did it, you got all the keys right! Thank you! You're my friend FOREVER!
textByHashes.9b354dc92f0d4b891bee54df4d633b3352506b5c: Hey, bring me that key you've got! I wanna get out of here!
textByHashes.fb7c3579b5b3282f2b9b8b11922cc688b5725f93: Thanks a lot for your help! Here, have a present:
textByHashes.b7166463a4a196347307e2d83e897eca33e4daa5: Don't mind me, I was just leaving...
textByHashes.da72ce94c737361b862feb6098324a1b765d2efe: No thanks, I don't want that just now.
textByHashes.ccb6eda6633167b61d87ee63a05611dd55faf624: Oi! No dropping stuff in the exit! Chuck it somewhere else!
